title: PBJ's Assorted Christmas Plush Toy with Jelly Ball Inside (8 cm) 1 Pc. - Adorable & Fun Collectible, Perfect Holiday Decorations, Stress Reliever, Gift & Stocking Stuffer
features: CHARMING CHRISTMAS CHARACTERS: Choose from 4 delightful plush toys - Rudy reindeer, Elfis elf, snowball snowman, and Santa - each featuring a festive design to brighten up your holiday decorations
HIGH-QUALITY PLUSH MATERIAL: Our Christmas plush toys are made with soft, non-toxic fabric to ensure a cozy and safe addition to your holiday collection.

JELLY BALL STRESS RELIEF: Squeeze and enjoy the satisfying sensation of the jelly ball popping out of each 8 cm Christmas plush toy - a perfect stress reliever for both kids and adults during the busy holiday season.
VERSATILE HOLIDAY FUN: Use these charming plush toys as unique stocking stuffers, festive table decorations, or a thoughtful gift for friends, family, and colleagues during the Christmas season.
COLLECT THEM ALL: Start or expand your holiday PBJ's assorted Christmas plush toy collection, and experience hours of sensory enjoyment while celebrating the joy and spirit of the season.
description: Experience the joy of the holiday season with PBJ's assorted Christmas plush toy with jelly ball inside. Measuring a compact 8 cm, this collectible toy is an irresistible mix of adorable and fun, making it the perfect addition to your festive decorations. More than just a cute ornament, it also doubles as a stress reliever. Squeeze it to feel the jelly ball inside and experience a satisfying sensation that helps alleviate anxiety and stress. With its charming design and soothing functionality, it makes for a thoughtful gift and an ideal stocking stuffer. Turn your holiday season into a delightful celebration with PBJ's assorted Christmas plush toy.
